steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content:
The decisive clue is the speaker’s claim that “there is no better example of the form.”
This tells us that Jerry Pinkney’s work cannot be surpassed, so the blank must mean something like outshone or surpassed.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Eclipsed means surpassed or outshone, which matches the idea that no one has ever surpassed Pinkney’s work.
The other three either contradict the sense of being unmatched, describe unrelated actions, or reverse the relationship.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
